name: English Muffin Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the English muffin halves on a cookie sheet.
2. Spread each half with enough pizza sauce to cover generously.
3. Put 3-4 slices of pepperoni on each half.
4. Place a generous portion of shredded cheese on top of each pizza.
5. Place in a preheated oven at 350°F for approximately 15 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
